evals.prompt: 在 FastAPI backend 新增 projects API。Project 需要 id、name、description、is_active，先支援 list 與 create，並遵守 feature-based router/schema/service 架構。
evals.expected_output: A backend implementation or implementation plan that follows the FastAPI feature architecture, registers the router in app/features/router.py, and creates schemas, service, router, and __init__.py.
assertions: Output includes a projects feature split into __init__.py, router.py, schemas.py, and service.py.
Output registers the projects router in app/features/router.py instead of importing it directly in app/main.py.
Output keeps HTTP wiring in router.py and business rules in service.py.
Output includes response_model, status code, and Pydantic request/response schema guidance.

evals.prompt: 建立 /version endpoint，回傳 service name、environment、version，請用直觀的 FastAPI feature 結構實作。
evals.expected_output: A minimal version feature with router.py, schemas.py, service.py, and __init__.py, registered through app/features/router.py.
assertions: Output follows the minimal feature pattern with router.py, schemas.py, service.py, and __init__.py.
Output registers the version router in app/features/router.py.
Output exposes the endpoint under /version or the project existing API prefix.
Output keeps app/main.py focused on app creation and feature router inclusion.

evals.prompt: users feature 新增 GET /users/{user_id}，找不到時回 404，請分層放在 router、schema、service。
evals.expected_output: Changes that add a service-level get-by-id method, HTTPException 404 handling, and a router endpoint with response_model=UserRead.
assertions: Output adds get-by-id behavior in app/features/users/service.py.
Output raises HTTPException 404 from the service layer when a user is not found.
Output adds GET /users/{user_id} in the router with response_model=UserRead.
Output avoids putting business rules directly in the router.

evals.prompt: 建立一個新的 FastAPI greenfield backend，請定義專案架構並保留後續擴充 feature 的位置。
evals.expected_output: A greenfield FastAPI project with app/main.py, app/core/config.py, app/core/middleware.py, app/features/router.py, and a health feature under app/features/health.
assertions: Output defines app/main.py with create_app() and app = create_app().
Output includes app/core/config.py and app/core/middleware.py for application-level concerns.
Output includes app/features/router.py as the only feature router aggregator imported by app/main.py.
Output includes app/features/health with __init__.py, router.py, schemas.py, and service.py.
Output keeps database, ORM, migration, and Docker concerns out of this FastAPI framework scaffold.
